title: Shri Saraswati Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Saraswati Mata Ki Aarti and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Saraswati.
description:
Jai Saraswati Mata,
Maiya Jai Saraswati Mata.
Sadgun vaibhav shalini,
Tribhuvan vikhyata॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Chandravadani padmasini,
Dyuti mangalkari.
Sohe shubh hans savari,
Atul tejdhari॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Baayein kar mein veena,
Kar mein pustak rajai.
Neeche kar mein mala,
Ati shubh mukh sajai॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Kar saroj mein pustak,
Shashi sam dyuti nyari.
Bhandar avidya mitave,
Maiya vidya ki dhari॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Tum hi ho jag janani,
Tum hi ho gyani.
Sabki buddhi vidhata,
Tum hi ho kalyani॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Andhkar ko harti,
Gyan prakash lati.
Maiya sab par kripa,
Nirantar barsati॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Maa Saraswati ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Kahat Shivanand Swami,
Gyan-bhakti paave॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥
